revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-070 

A winding for the production of a magnetic field in an electric machine.

Note: The excitation winding that produces the main magnetic field is called the field winding.

{{IALAFooter}}
